untranslatable_reason: Cup and Handle is a visual/shape-based pattern that requires detecting specific morphological features: U-shaped cup formation (7-65 weeks duration), handle formation (7+ days), and handle pullback depth. These cannot be expressed as mathematical conditions on the allowed indicators without custom pattern recognition logic. The 30% rise threshold can be approximated with returns, but the pattern geometry (cup shape discrimination vs V-shape, handle slope, relative depths) requires untranslatable domain-specific pattern detection.
translation_notes: Attempted approximation: Used close > sma_50 as proxy for uptrend context and returns >= 0.30 for the minimum rise requirement. Used close < sma_20 as a reasonable exit on trend break. However, this loses the critical Cup and Handle morphology constraints. Author silent on exit conditions, so a technical reversal was chosen.
